biomAid 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Multiple Comparison Criteria

    • Extracting and Padding Field Trial Layouts
    • BLUP Accuracy in Multi-Environment Trials

    Simulate Multi-Environment Plant Breeding Trial Data

    simTrialData.Rd

    Generates a balanced field trial dataset with a realistic factor-analytic genetic correlation structure across environments.

    MET-only (treatments = NULL): a simple randomised complete block design with one observation per Variety × Site × Rep combination.

    Multi-treatment (treatments is a character vector of length ≥ 2): a split-plot design where whole plots are treatment strips and sub-plots are varieties, nested within replicate blocks. The genetic structure operates over all Treatment × Site (TSite) combinations.

    Genetic simulation uses a factor-analytic (FA) covariance model: $$ \mathbf{u}_v = \boldsymbol{\Lambda}\mathbf{f}_v + \boldsymbol{\delta}_v, \quad \mathbf{f}_v \sim \mathcal{N}(\mathbf{0}, \mathbf{I}_{k}), \quad \boldsymbol{\delta}_v \sim \mathcal{N}(\mathbf{0}, \boldsymbol{\Psi}) $$ where \(\boldsymbol{\Lambda}\) (\(J \times k\)) is the loadings matrix, \(k\) = n_fa, \(J\) is the number of environments (or Treatment × Site combinations), and \(\boldsymbol{\Psi} = \mathrm{diag}(\psi_1,\ldots,\psi_J)\) is the specific variance matrix. The true genetic covariance matrix is \(\mathbf{G} = \boldsymbol{\Lambda}\boldsymbol{\Lambda}^\top + \boldsymbol{\Psi}\).

    Usage

    simTrialData(
  nvar = 20L,
  nsite = 10L,
  treatments = NULL,
  nrep = 2L,
  n_fa = 2L,
  seed = NULL,
  verbose = TRUE,
  sim.options = list()
)

    Arguments

    nvar

    Integer. Number of varieties. Default 20.

    nsite

    Integer. Number of environments (sites). Default 10.

    treatments

    Character vector of treatment labels (length >= 2), or NULL (default) for a MET-only trial with no treatment structure.

    nrep

    Integer. Replicates per environment. Default 2.

    n_fa

    Integer. Number of FA factors used in the data-generating genetic model. Controls the complexity of the between-environment correlation structure; must be less than the number of groups (environments or Treatment x Site combinations). Default 2.

    seed

    Integer or NULL. Passed to set.seed(). Default NULL.

    verbose

    Logical. Print a design summary and suggested ASReml-R model. Default TRUE.

    sim.options

    Named list of optional simulation controls. Unknown names produce a warning. Recognised elements (with defaults) are:

    rows_per_strip

    Integer or NULL (auto). Rows per treatment strip in a replicate block (split-plot only). With cols_per_strip must satisfy rows_per_strip * cols_per_strip == nvar.

    cols_per_strip

    Integer or NULL (auto). Columns per treatment strip (split-plot only).

    site_mean

    Numeric. Grand mean yield. Default 4500.

    site_sd

    Numeric. SD of site mean yields. Default 600.

    treat_effects

    Numeric vector (length = length(treatments)) of fixed treatment effects, or NULL for auto-spacing from 0 to site_mean * 0.10. Multi-treatment only.

    sigma_genetic

    Numeric. Target mean genetic SD per group. Default 250.

    loading_min

    Numeric >= 0. Minimum absolute FA loading before scaling. Default 0.5.

    loading_max

    Numeric > loading_min. Maximum absolute FA loading before scaling. Default 2.5.

    specific_pct

    Numeric in (0, 1). Specific variances set to this fraction of the mean diagonal of Lambda Lambda'. Default 0.20.

    rep_sd

    Numeric. SD of replicate effects. Default 150.

    row_sd

    Numeric. SD of row spatial effects. Default 80.

    col_sd

    Numeric. SD of column spatial effects. Default 60.

    error_sd

    Numeric. SD of plot-level residual. Default 350.

    sep

    Character. Separator for TSite labels (e.g. "T0-Env01"). Default "-".

    variety_prefix

    Character. Prefix for variety labels. Default "Var".

    site_prefix

    Character. Prefix for site labels. Default "Env".

    outfile

    Character path or NULL. If non-NULL the data frame is written to a CSV file. Default NULL.

    Value

    A named list:

    data

    Data frame ordered by Site, Row, Column with columns: Site, Variety, Rep, Row, Column, yield (MET-only), or additionally Treatment and TSite (multi-treatment).

    params

    Named list of true simulation parameters:

    G

    True genetic covariance matrix (J x J).

    Lambda

    True loadings matrix (J x k).

    Psi

    True specific variances (length J).

    site_means

    True site mean yields (length nsite).

    n_fa

    Number of FA factors used.

    treat_effects

    True treatment fixed effects (multi-treatment only).

    g_arr

    nvar x ngroup matrix of true genetic BLUPs, columns are groups in TSite order (multi-treatment only).

    Examples

    if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# MET-only: 30 varieties, 8 sites, FA(2) genetic structure
out <- simTrialData(nvar = 30, nsite = 8, n_fa = 2, seed = 42)
head(out$data)
round(cov2cor(out$params$G), 2)   # true genetic correlations

# Multi-treatment with custom error SD
out2 <- simTrialData(nvar = 20, nsite = 6,
                     treatments = c("T0", "T1", "T2"),
                     n_fa = 2, seed = 1,
                     sim.options = list(error_sd = 200))
} # }
